title: 5 December Buffett Dividend Dog Buys, 3 To Await
text: This Buffett holdings list from Kiplinger first appeared 11/15/22 on line. YCharts and Dogs of The Dow both track this Buffett/Berkshire batch. Here is your update from the 12/23/22 YCharts data. 33 of 49 current Berkshire Hathaway-owned stocks pay dividends. As of 12/23/22, the top ten ranged 3.3%-5.76% by annual yield and 47 of 49 ranged -2.25% to 78.66% per broker-estimated target-price-upsides.

title: The Top Reasons Buffett Chose HP Over Dell
text: Berkshire Hathaway built a 10%+ stake in HP Inc. - this appears somewhat surprising as the company operates in largely commoditized and highly competitive industries. In this article, I will highlight reasons why Berkshire has likely preferred HP Inc over Dell Technologies Inc, a somewhat similar but more diversified business.
